whatWeWorkedOn: Deployed AggDB API to IGS-Intrusion, built frontend v4 features, troubleshot network access for Rebecca
whatWasAccomplished: API deployed to IGS-Intrusion via fix_deploy_intrusion.ps1 (Python 3.12 embeddable, FastAPI, pyodbc)
Firewall rule created for TCP 8000 on Intrusion
Rebecca connected successfully from 172.28.196.231 via http://172.20.222.123:8000/

Frontend v4 new features: All Records view in Browse, Edit arrows on Rec rows, edit mode with blue banner, temp audit doc auto-link on New Site, username prompt with alias resolution (rka->rkanderson, cat->ctate, lk->lknudsen), blocked username validation, better error messages
Backend new endpoints: GET /api/recs (list all), GET /api/recs/{id} (detail with linked sites), PUT /api/recs/{id} (update), POST /api/reclinks (link rec to site)
SiteCreate model extended with LinkRecID for auto-linking temp audit doc
Temp audit doc is IGSfakeTILLitEXISTS (RecType Other, RecTypeID 99)
Rebecca created site Br-2c (Dover Hardrock) successfully
Discovered IGS_NO_AUDIT_TESTING orphan rec linked to nonexistent site Wa-1-s
deploy_update.ps1 created for quick pushes from Antiquarian to Intrusion
whatDidNotWork: Chrome extension (fcoeoabgfenejglbffodgkkbkcdhcgfn) blocked by Chrome on IGS network - ERR_BLOCKED_BY_CLIENT
Git not in system PATH on Antiquarian - breaks Git LFS, Chrome extension, and any subprocess needing git
Git LFS filter breaks git commit and git status when git.exe not in PATH (even when using full path for git commands, LFS subprocess still fails)
Git Bash approach attempted but cmd.exe PATH manipulation unreliable in MCP shell context
Git commit of AggDB files NOT completed - add succeeded but commit failed due to LFS PATH issue

pendingGitWork.intendedCommitMessage: AggDB API and frontend v4 - FastAPI backend, data entry UI, deploy scripts, user audit, temp doc workflow
pendingGitWork.branchIssue: HEAD is master, remote tracks main. origin/main matches master at a08510a. main branch has Doc-to-Rec rename commit (3a09080) ahead 1, behind 13. Need to reconcile master/main before push.
pendingGitWork.suggestedFix: On BIGSPIDER or after PATH fix: git commit staged files, reconcile master/main (merge main into master or rename), push to origin

environmentIssues.gitNotInPATH: Git installed at C:\Program Files\Git\bin\git.exe but NOT in system PATH on Antiquarian. This breaks Git LFS subprocess calls, Chrome extension, and any tool relying on git in PATH.
environmentIssues.chromeExtensionBlocked: Chrome extension fcoeoabgfenejglbffodgkkbkcdhcgfn blocked - likely related to PATH or Chrome policy on IGS network. Manifested today (2026-03-06) for first time.
environmentIssues.fixRequired: Add C:\Program Files\Git\bin and C:\Program Files\Git\cmd to system PATH. Requires admin. This likely fixes both git and Chrome extension issues.

currentDBState.recLinks: IGSfakeTILLitEXISTS linked to both tt-00-s and Br-2c. IGS_NO_AUDIT_TESTING linked to Wa-1-s (does not exist).

nextSteps: 1. Fix Git PATH on Antiquarian (add to system PATH, requires admin)
2. Complete git commit and push from BIGSPIDER or Antiquarian after PATH fix
4. Investigate Chrome extension blocking - may resolve with PATH fix
6. Verify Rebecca can create sites and recs end-to-end
7. Circle back on audit trail - username system needs review
